Holmes & Watson (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $30,568,743Details
International Box Office $11,357,862
Worldwide Box Office $41,926,605
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,199,331
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,264,989
Total $2,464,320
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Step Brothers are reunited – this time playing the world’s greatest consulting detective and his loyal biographer

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,411,522 (24.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:72.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$42,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,776 opening theaters/2,780 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $40,065,175

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2018 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: December 20th, 2018 (Wide) (New Zealand)
December 21st, 2018 (Wide) (Australia)
December 26th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
December 27th, 2018 (Wide) (Hungary)
December 27th, 2018 (Wide) (Israel)
Video Release: March 26th, 2019 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude sexual material, some violence, language and drug references.
(Rating bulletin 2555 (Cert #50807), 11/28/2018)
Running Time: 90 minutes
Plot point: Assassination, Private Investigator, Royalty, Woman in a Male Dominated Profession
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Time period setting: 1890s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Mosaic Media, Gary Sanchez Productions, Columbia Pictures, Mimran Schur Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
